classifications.label: Workspace operational data
classifications.summary: Internal workspace records that stay scoped to active members and inherit governance retention defaults.

classifications.label: Shared personal data
classifications.summary: Records that can expose recipient identity or viewing behavior outside the primary workspace boundary.

classifications.label: Export and audit evidence
classifications.summary: Generated audit and export packages that require owner-bounded access and redacted transport.

datasets.title: Workspace collaboration records
recordExamples: Goals, approvals, commitments, and action logs
minimizationRules: Reads stay limited to the active workspace rather than a global operator queue.
Workspace membership is required before collaboration records are returned.
Retention defaults come from workspace governance instead of per-surface ad hoc values.
maskingRules: Operator summaries avoid raw provider payload echoes.
API failures return sanitized messages instead of storage internals.

retention.deletionFlow: Retention enforcement expires aged collaboration records according to workspace policy.

accessRules: Only workspace members can read collaboration state.
Only workspace owners can change governance settings that widen retention or autonomy.

datasets.title: Goal share records
minimizationRules: Share records store bounded metadata instead of duplicating full goal content.
Revocation flows keep the share record but stop further access immediately.
maskingRules: Dashboard summaries show share status and timing without exposing hidden delivery internals.

retention.deletionFlow: Retention enforcement revokes expired shares before removing aged share history.

accessRules: Workspace members manage shares through the goal boundary.
Privacy operations can revoke or remove share records during retention and deletion workflows.

datasets.title: Audit and export packages
minimizationRules: Exports are generated on demand instead of being continuously materialized.
Only the active workspace scope is packaged for export.
maskingRules: Tamper-evident export metadata is preserved without leaking raw secrets.
Queue failures are sanitized before they reach operators.

retention.deletionFlow: Workspace export and deletion paths preserve only the owner audit trail after destructive cleanup.

accessRules: Only the workspace owner can queue export or deletion operations.
Audit exports remain explicit governance actions instead of ambient background replication.

datasets.title: Connector operational telemetry
minimizationRules: Readiness checks emit posture and reason codes instead of raw credential material.
Observability exports keep provider diagnostics scoped to operator-safe evidence.
maskingRules: Secrets, tokens, and sensitive payload fragments are redacted before logs or exports are emitted.

retention.deletionFlow: Operational telemetry follows the bounded evidence retention policy and is removed during workspace deletion.

accessRules: Connector health is surfaced through operator-safe summaries only.
Raw secret material remains encrypted and excluded from telemetry.

datasets.title: Dashboard cockpit telemetry and feedback
recordExamples: First meaningful render and summary latency histograms
Categorical recommendation feedback outcome and note-length metadata
minimizationRules: Command palette telemetry records action and category only, never the operator query.
Cockpit feedback is categorical and bounded to allowlisted surfaces, reasons, and sentiment.
Recommendation feedback metadata stores whether notes were supplied and their length, not the note body.
maskingRules: Telemetry excludes user ids, workspace ids, tokens, cookies, provider headers, and raw payloads.
Rollout logs contain bounded enum attributes and latency values only.

retention.deletionFlow: Cockpit telemetry follows the observability retention policy and is removed during workspace deletion.

accessRules: Cockpit telemetry is available only through operator-safe observability exports.
Feedback details remain scoped to the goal action log and avoid raw free-form note retention.

datasets.title: Learning capture memory and episodes
minimizationRules: Learning capture runs only after tenant, actor, and workspace boundaries are validated.
Disabled shadow-replay governance opts the workspace out before memory or episode persistence.
Episode metadata stores privacy lifecycle scope rather than duplicating raw workspace state.
maskingRules: Email addresses, bearer tokens, cookie/session identifiers, passwords, private keys, and secret assignments are redacted before persistence.
Execution details and recommendation rationales are sanitized before they are stored as learning evidence.

retention.deletionFlow: Learning memory records and episode files carry expiry and workspace scope so retention, export, and deletion operations can address them before reuse.

accessRules: Learning capture is scoped to the goal owner and workspace before records are created.
Self-improvement episodes must include learning privacy preflight metadata before worker persistence.
